unreadCount.description: Override the auto-computed unread badge count.

onItemClick.description: Called when a notification is clicked.

onMarkRead.description: Called when marking a single notification as read.

onMarkAllRead.description: Called when "Mark all read" is clicked.

onLoadMore.description: Called when scrolling near the bottom to load more.

hasMore.description: Whether more notifications can be loaded.

isLoading.description: Show loading indicator at the bottom.

triggerElement.description: Custom trigger element (replaces the default bell icon).

emptyMessage.description: Message shown when the list is empty.

header.description: Custom header for the notification panel.

footer.description: Custom footer for the notification panel.

maxHeight.description: Maximum height of the scrollable list.

itemTemplate.description: Custom render function for notification items.

className.description: Additional CSS class for the panel.

read.description: Whether the notification has been read.

action.description: Action button or link for the notification.

data.description: Custom data attached to the notification.
